description_long: This object is a standard stop sign mounted on a weathered wooden post, featuring an octagonal red sign face with bold white uppercase letters spelling 'STOP' and a smaller 'ALL WAY' sign beneath. The sign face is slightly worn, with some visible surface imperfections and minor damage at the top edge. The wooden post shows signs of age, including visible grain, knots, and some faded paint or markings. The rear and side views reveal metal brackets and fasteners securing the sign to the post, as well as some additional stickers or labels. The sign's reflective red surface is designed to catch headlights at night, enhancing visibility for drivers. The overall construction is robust, intended for outdoor use in urban environments such as street corners or intersections.
description: A weathered red octagonal stop sign with white 'STOP' text, mounted on a wooden post with a smaller 'ALL WAY' sign below. The sign shows signs of age and outdoor exposure.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the red octagonal stop sign with clear white 'STOP' text and the 'ALL WAY' sign below, mounted on a wooden post.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the sign, the mounting hardware, and the weathered texture of the post.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the sign, mounting brackets, and the full length of the wooden post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more of the post visible, including faded markings and the edge of the sign face.
